body:
_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

**Preserve an explicit empty tag selection.**

`parseTagsParam('')` already means “no filters”, but returning `undefined` here turns that into “no `tags` param”. `code/core/src/manager-api/modules/stories.ts` treats an absent `tags` param as “use preset defaults”, so clearing the last active filter cannot round-trip when any preset has `defaultFilterSelection`. Please keep a distinct empty serialization and make sure the URL-writing path preserves empty strings instead of dropping them.

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

In `@code/core/src/manager-api/modules/tags.ts` around lines 39 - 42, The
serialization currently returns undefined when both included and excluded are
empty which collapses an explicit “no tags” selection into an absent tags param;
change serializeTagsParam (in code/core/src/manager-api/modules/tags.ts) to
return an explicit empty string ('') when included.length===0 &&
excluded.length===0 so the URL-writing path can preserve the empty value instead
of dropping the param, and ensure this aligns with parseTagsParam so
parseTagsParam('') continues to mean “no filters” while undefined remains “no
tags param / use presets” (verify any callers in stories.ts that write the tags
param do not treat '' as missing).
```

</details>

<!-- fingerprinting:phantom:medusa:grasshopper -->

✅ Addressed in commit c9da280
